articles.title: Pixar’s New Animated Flick, Hoppers, Is Available For Preorder On Amazon
articles.description: I Hoppers Steelbook Edition 4K Blu-ray Sold Out | Release June 2 Preorder at Amazon Hoppers Standard Edition $30 | Releases June 2 Preorder at Amazon (Blu-ray) Preorder at Amazon (DVD) Disney and Pixar's latest animated, animal-themed film, Hoppers, is releasing on 4K Ultra HD, Blu-ray, and standard DVD on June 2, and is available for pre-order now on Amazon for $30. A DVD version is also available for $26. Hoppers Steelbook Edition 4K Blu-ray Sold Out | Release June 2 The Hoppers Steelbook 4K Blu-ray includes comes in a collectible Steelbook with two discs: Disc one contains Disney & Pixar's Hoppers movie, while disc two is packed with loads of extras like deleted scenes, a blooper reel, interviews with the cast and director Daniel Chong, and several behind-the-scenes featurettes. This version also features a redemption code for a digital version of the film. Preorder at Amazon Hoppers Standard Edition $30 | Releases June 2 The Hoppers Standard Edition includes the Hoppers film in both Blu-Ray and DVD format, along with a redemption code for a digital copy of the film. This version also includes special features like bloopers, deleted scenes, cast & crew interviews, and behind-the-scenes featurettes. Preorder at Amazon (Blu-ray) Preorder at Amazon (DVD) Bonus features The Critter Diaries: A short film following the Pixar team as they explore Yellowstone Park, study its wildlife, and "find real-life inspiration for Hoppers' characters." Hopping In: The filmmakers, cast, and crew of hoppers discuss its animation, and how it was used to bring the film's cast of characters to life. Deleted scenes (with an introduction by director Daniel Chong and editor Axel Geddes) "Meet King George" scene breakdown: Daniel Chong and his team show how they created King George's Superlodge. Beaverton Revealed: Reveals the film's Pixar cameos, hidden references, and behind-the-scenes facts. "Dam Good Bloopers": blooper reel Essentially serving as an amusing, Pixar-animated nod to Disney's own Avatar franchise, Hoppers follows the story of Mabel (Piper Curda), a young animal loving college student who manages to get her hands on tech that "hops" her into the body of an animal--in Mabel's case, the body of a robotic beaver. Having befriended the non-human residents of the little patch of nature in which the film takes place, Mabel must stop local politician Mayor Jerry (Jon Hamm) from building a freeway over her new friends' home. Hoppers marks Pixar's first major sci-fi film since 2008's Wall-E, currently holds a 94% fresh rating on Rotten Tomatoes, and enjoyed a profitable opening weekend with plenty of critical praise . Check Out More Deals And Preorders Where To Preorder Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 The New Lego Sets Dropping in June Include a Ton of New Disney, Marvel, and Bluey Sets, and So Much More New K-Pop Demon Hunters, Marvel, DC, And Star Wars Hot Toys Figures Are Up For Preorder Preorders Are Live For Magic: The Gathering’s Reality Fracture Event Magic: The Gathering’s Hobbit Is Now Available to Preorder GOG’s Square Enix Sale Includes 11 Classic Final Fantasy, Mana, And SaGa Games Grab Physical PS5 Games For Up To 60% Off During PlayStation’s Days Of Play Sale The Best Discounts In PlayStation’s Days Of Play Event – PS5 Deals Of The Week (May 27, 2026) Nintendo’s New ‘Choose Your Game Bundle’ Is Now Available For $500 PS5’s Coolest DualSense Controllers Are Discounted For Days Of Play PlayStation VR 2 Is On Sale For Its Best Price During Days Of Play GOG’s Square Enix Sale Includes 11 Classic Final Fantasy, Mana, And SaGa Games This Xbox Series X Bundle Includes Forza Horizon 6 And A Controller For Free 8BitDo Reveals Ultimate 3E Modular Controller For Xbox And PC Show More Check Out More Deals And Preorders Links (11)
